description: A deaf student needs to request an American Sign Language (ASL) interpreter for one of their newly registered classes.

nodes.task_description: Identify the student and confirm their approved accommodation for ASL interpretation.

expected_outcome.value: Agent verifies the student's record includes 'ASL Interpreter for lectures'.

nodes.task_description: Collect the details of the course requiring the interpreter (course name, schedule, location).

expected_outcome.value: Agent gathers all necessary logistical information.

nodes.task_description: Submit a request to the interpreter scheduling coordinator with the course details.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates a service request in the scheduling system.
